article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent names in the music industry. He has released a sample pack in collaboration with Barnation.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has made a name for himself through collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry. His work has been noted for its distinctive production style and rhythmic innovations.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drum sounds that have been utilized in various of his productions.

His collaborations extend to working with artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, further cementing his presence in the electronic and dance music scenes. Noizekid's approach to production is characterized by a blend of traditional dancehall rhythms with modern electronic elements.
While his top tracks and recent releases are not indexed, his influence is evident through his work with other notable artists including ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
